creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
on amd64 10.2-release, using exclusively pkg I get:

# pkg check -d grace
Checking grace: 100%
grace has a missing dependency: pdflib
grace has a missing dependency: fftw

>>> Missing package dependencies were detected.
>>> Found 2 issue(s) in the package database.

pkg: No packages available to install matching 'pdflib' have been found in the repositories
>>> Summary of actions performed:

pdflib dependency failed to be fixed
fftw dependency failed to be fixed

>>> There are still missing dependencies.
>>> You are advised to try fixing them manually.

>>> Also make sure to check 'pkg updating' for known issues.
